text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, July 06. No work meetings today. You have Sarah wanting to work on her design course and gardening in the front walkway.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Hosted a game night at our place. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Catan is always a good time. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is practicing Minuet in G for the upcoming piano recital. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Sounds exciting! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! Space science and tech is a great focus. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Checking on some house maintenance items. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. I can help troubleshoot that. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Yum, that sounds delicious! Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: That sounds like a sweet moment. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've adjusted the local settings. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that having dinner with our friends tonight. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've noted the plans. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! That's a big step. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Space science and tech is a great focus. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Good call on checking that. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Let's organize the menu. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. My starting running back is questionable. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Good weekend progress on home projects. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
